title_en: An Exclusive New Clip From Evil Dead Burn Unleashes a Jaw-Droppingly Gross Deadite Attack That Will Leave Horror Fans Reeling
summary_en: Attendees at IGN Live 2026 were treated to an exclusive sneak peek at Evil Dead Burn. And, yikes, this scene certainly puts the “burn” in Evil Dead Burn. Cheers!
body_en:
Attendees at IGN Live 2026 were treated to an exclusive sneak peek at Evil Dead Burn, which you can now watch here via the player embedded below. And, yikes, this scene certainly puts the “burn” in Evil Dead Burn. Cheers!
“After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home,” according to the film’s official synopsis.
“As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.”
Enjoy this exclusive scene from Evil Dead Burn:
New Line Cinema’s Evil Dead Burn stars Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, and Greta Van Den Brink.
Sébastien Vaniček (Infested) directs this latest entry in the long-running horror franchise , which opens in theaters July 10, 2026.
Evil Dead Burn won’t be the last we’ll see of the Deadites, however.
is the next movie in the series and is slated to be released on April 7, 2028. Creator Sam Raimi, who is an executive producer on the film, told attendees at this year’s CinemaCon that Evil Dead Wrath will be "the most terrifying experience. "
For more coverage from IGN Live and Summer of Gaming, be sure to check out everything that was announced at Summer Game Fest .
